canonicalSolution: export function sumEvens(arr: number[]): number { return arr.filter(n => n % 2 === 0).reduce((acc, n) => acc + n, 0); }
test: assert(sumEvens([1,2,3,4,5,6])===12); assert(sumEvens([])===0); assert(sumEvens([1,3,5])===0); assert(sumEvens([2,4,6])===12); assert(sumEvens([-2,1,-4])===(-6)); assert(sumEvens([0,1,2])===2);
